title: Investigation & Recruitment
content: You explore an abandoned containment site and meet new allies. Evidence of corporate ties and Hunters' improvisations appears in lockers and notebooks.

choices.text: Inspect the branded crate in the back room
Press Ayaka about the shrine (gentle tone)
Peer into Emi's locker when left unattended

meta.notes: Introduces Hunters' Circle hints and Kenta's anchor sketch (S14). Keep social beats light.
